sections.heading: The transfer of ordinary shares in China Non-Ferrous Metal Exemption
sections.text:
from tax
Mining (Group) Company Limited to the Government of the
Republic of Zambia shall be exempt from property transfer tax.
A. B. CHIKWANDA,
LUSAKA Minister of Finance
I 6th January, 2012
[MFB.103/12/9]
